pages.title: Learning the Basics
pages.text: To start working with dyes you will have to craft a Dyemaking Table, and get your hands on 2 Glass Bottles

Basic Bottled Dye is made from just three ingredients: a Water Bottle, an empty Glass Bottle, and any dyes or pigments. To create more specialized dyes, add a Dye Core during crafting to determine the $(l:weaversparadise:dyemaking/dye_types)Dye Type$().

pages.title: Double Colors
pages.text: Some Dye Types require a secondary color. To add one, place the Bottled Dye back into the Dyemaking Table in the Water Bottle slot, then add the second dyes to complete the recipe.
